fact: The first official international cricket match was played in 1844 between the United States and Canada.
The first FIFA World Cup was held in 1930 in Uruguay, where the hosts won the tournament.
Badminton made its official debut as a medal sport at the Barcelona 1992 Olympic Games.
Kabaddi received international exposure during a demonstration match at the 1936 Berlin Olympics before being officially included in the Asian Games in 1990.
The oldest tennis tournament in the world is the Wimbledon Championships, which was first played in London in 1877.
